name: data-inspector-ui
description: @cap-js/data-inspector plugin's own UI5 app, included as source code in the npm package, intended to be built and included in the dependent app's MTAR file (for deployment using MTA) or the HTML5 apps content image (for deployment using @sap/html5-app-deployer). See the @cap-js/data-inspector README for detail.

scripts.build:cf: rimraf dist && ui5 build preload --clean-dest --config ui5-deploy.yaml --include-task=generateCachebusterInfo
